name: SuperOps MSP Platform API
what_it_does: SuperOps REST API for modern managed service provider (MSP) platform combining RMM and PSA. Enables AI agents to manage IT support tickets and SLAs, access device inventory and health monitoring, manage client accounts and projects, handle invoicing and billing, trigger remote monitoring and scripting, integrate with documentation tools, and connect MSP operations with external business systems.
use_cases: Managing IT support tickets and SLA tracking from MSP helpdesk agents
Monitoring client device health and triggering alerts from IT operations agents
Managing client accounts and project status from MSP business agents
Integrating ticket data with client communication tools from service delivery agents
not_for: In-house IT without managed service provider client billing and multi-tenancy
Large enterprise ITSM without SMB MSP operational focus
Non-IT service businesses without managed services workflows
best_when: A growing MSP using SuperOps wants AI agents to automate ticket management, client device monitoring, SLA tracking, and billing workflows with a modern API-first platform.
avoid_when: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Remote device access and monitoring capabilities require strict access controls. Client system access without authorization is a critical security and legal risk.

auth.notes: SuperOps uses API key with scope-based access control. API keys can be configured with specific data access scopes. Account-level credentials. Developer portal with comprehensive documentation.

pricing.paid_tiers: Starter, Pro, and Super plans; per-technician with endpoint limits per tier
pricing.notes: Chennai, India company, founded 2020. Modern AI-native MSP platform built for digital-first service providers. Growing rapidly in MSP market. Strong API documentation — more developer-friendly than legacy MSP tools.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; 60 requests per minute on standard plans

known_agent_gotchas: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Remote device monitoring and access requires strict authorization
No public MCP server — REST API with scoped API keys
60 requests/minute rate limit — implement throttling for bulk operations
Indian company — US and EU data residency options; GDPR compliant
Modern API-first platform — better documentation than legacy MSP tools
AI-native features built in — verify overlap with custom AI agent functionality
agent_readiness.security_notes: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: MSP platform with client endpoint access. SOC2, GDPR. Scoped API keys — better than typical MSP platforms. US/EU data residency. Indian company.

security_score_components.security_notes: MSP endpoint access platform. SOC2, GDPR. Scoped API keys. US/EU data residency. Better security posture than typical MSP tools.
